A0151.title: Phased OTA Deployment and Canary Release
A0151.definition: A strategy of deploying updates through small-scale pilots and gradual rollout to minimize the impact of batch update failures or malicious updates.
A0151.description: Cautious deployment strategy: small-scale canary testing; monitoring the status of updated devices; emergency suspension in case of anomalies; A/B testing; automatic rollback mechanism; user-selectable update timing.
A0151.limitation: Extended deployment cycle; high management complexity; slow response to emergency updates.
keywords: Phased OTA Deployment and Canary Release
